'''Kelbo''' was a [[M'shento'su'Nikto]] who frequented [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. He and his friend [[Zutmore]] often borrowed [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena]].
{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Unidentified_Nikto_trader.jpg|thumb|left|Kelbo in ''Yoda Stories''.]]
Although the [[M'shento'su'Nikto]] were modeled on Kelbo's appearance, he was not officially identified as a member of the race until the [[2013]] [[Star Wars Blog]] article, ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special Cantina: Who's Who]]''.

Kelbo also appears sporadically and randomly in the non-[[canon]] game ''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]''.
